items.title: Where Will Plug Power Be in 5 Years?
items.author: Neha Chamaria
items.description: Plug Power aims to transform its business by focusing on green hydrogen production and electrolyzers, with plans to become profitable by 2028. The company has shown significant progress in 2025, including record hydrogen plant production and improved financial metrics.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Company has tripled electrolyzer revenue, improved gross margins, set clear profitability roadmap, and projected potential stock price growth to $12 by 2030
